title: The Acquittal of Pelagius.

verses.book: A Work on the Proceedings of Pelagius.
A Work on the Proceedings of Pelagius.
verses.text: The synod said: “Now since we have received satisfaction on the points which have come before us touching the monk Pelagius, who has been present; since, too, he gives his consent to the pious doctrines, and even anathematizes everything that is contrary to the Church’s faith, we confess him to belong to the communion of the Catholic Church.”
